author: Markiplier
text:
THE BEAUTIFUL TERRIFYING OCEAN | Subnautica 2 - Part 1
Did you know that my original Subnautica series had 78 episodes? That seems crazy to me but then again it was an incredible game. The sequal is looking to be every bit as special as the first!

Play the Game ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
MORE Subnautica ► https://studio.youtube.com/playlist/PL3tRBEVW0hiBkczi51cX7egr8X5qZhVqK/edit?o=U
